explanations.1: This starts a configuration section for Ruff, a Python linter and code formatter tool.
explanations.3: The exclude list is empty, meaning Ruff will check all files (not skipping anything).
explanations.5: This comment explains that the line-length value matches settings in other config files to keep the whole project consistent.
explanations.6: Lines of code are allowed to be up to 120 characters long before Ruff complains about line length.
